name: Foundation & Packaging
description: Groups the founding packaging and reference-harness decisions plus the ADR index that frame how nxtlvl is shipped and bootstrapped.

name: Composition Strategy & Governance
description: Groups the compose-not-reconstruct build doctrine, its supersessions, the router endorsement rule, the decision-recording rule, and the reactive-growth governance model.

name: Context & Memory
description: Groups the decisions on extending native memory, context-budgeted injection, success metrics, the session-lifecycle floor, and quality-first over leanness.

name: Hooks & Gating
description: Groups the hook-safety fail-open rule, the reactive intake gate, and the objective invoked audit gate that govern when the harness may block.

name: Agent Model
description: Groups the decisions defining how agents and skills divide labor — design contract, authoring, evaluation, debugging, orchestration, and operation.

name: Capability & Workflow Domains
description: Groups the decisions that ship concrete three-layer capability and workflow domains — confident-core, git-workflows, project identity, ideation, and project management.

name: Docs-Grounding & Reference
description: Groups the decisions on external knowledge sources — DeepWiki orientation-only versus Context7 version-pinned evidence — and the read-only-by-withheld-tools scout pattern.

name: Labs, Build & Tooling
description: Groups the incubation-lab topology, cell plugin architecture, objective graduation contract, and the TypeScript-by-type-stripping language and build decisions.
